title: NPC soul file (v0 — authored birth-state)
description: The authored starting state of an NPC soul: identity, personality, allegiances, skills. This file is the template the soul engine (Pan) instantiates from. Runtime soul state — memory tree, emotional state, relationship deltas — lives in save data, never here. v1 adds the memory/goal/emotion contracts when the Pan bridge lands.

allegiances.description: Faction or group id -> starting disposition, -100 (sworn enemy) to +100 (would die for).

extra.description: Free-form escape hatch for mod-specific data. Never read by the engine.
